_doc: All player-facing strings for the Blue Folder UI. Code owns keys; Design owns values.

empty_states.evidence: No evidence in the folder yet.
empty_states.motion_packet: No active case has a motion packet yet.

status.case_folder_acquired: Press [%s] to open your case folder.

save_reasons._doc: Failure-reason text concatenated by save_status_toast.gd after status.save_failed_prefix. Keys are consumed by scripts/systems/save.gd.
save_reasons.cannot_open_write: Cannot open the save file for writing.
save_reasons.cannot_open_read: Cannot open the save file for reading.
save_reasons.corrupt_reset: The save file is corrupt; progress was reset.

binder._doc: Motion Packet tab strings. Slot/remedy labels are canonical; banner strings are status-line copy.

banners.need_min_elements: Need at least %d required elements before filing.
banners.empty_state_body: Surface evidence through dialogue and investigation, then return to the binder.
